  "findings": [
    "Primary and secondary conductors landed on opposite terminals of the transformer",
    "Reversed connection creates immediate risk of overvoltage on secondary side",
    "Transformer may be energized with incorrect voltage ratio, damaging downstream equipment"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Lock out and tag out the transformer immediately",
    "Verify transformer nameplate primary and secondary voltage ratings",
    "Re-terminate primary and secondary conductors to correct bushings per manufacturer and NEC 450",
    "Perform insulation resistance and turns ratio tests before re-energization"
  ],
  "rationale": "Reversing primary and secondary connections violates NEC Article 450 installation requirements and manufacturer instructions. This condition can cause catastrophic failure, fire, or severe injury upon energization. The installation is non-compliant and presents a critical safety hazard.",

    "NEC Art. 450",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
